name: ML & News Feed
description: Trending ML/AI papers, tech news, and topics personalized to your interests via AI-powered web search

settings.label: Extra Interests
settings.description: Additional interests beyond your Fwubbo profile (comma-separated, e.g. 'diffusion models, robotics, startups')

settings.label: Source Types
settings.description: Types to include: paper, news, blog, tool, discussion (comma-separated)

settings.label: Re-search Interval (hours)
settings.description: How often to run a fresh AI web search (cached between searches)
